Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.fluxnova

Interface FluxnovaFormProperty

All Superinterfaces:
BpmnModelElementInstance, ModelElementInstance
All Known Implementing Classes:
FluxnovaFormPropertyImpl
public interface FluxnovaFormProperty extends BpmnModelElementInstance
The BPMN formProperty camunda extension element
Author:
Sebastian Menski
